name: Crab Rangoon
recipeIngredient: 6 oz crab meat, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crab meat, cream cheese, red pepper, water chestnuts, garlic, scallion, and white pepper in a bowl. Refrigerate until ready to use.
2. Place 1 teaspoon of the filling mixture into each wonton wrapper.
3. Fold the wrappers to form triangles, enclosing the filling completely.
4. Cover and refrigerate until ready to use.
5. Heat oil in a deep pan or pot to 375°F (190°C).
6. Carefully place the folded wonton wraps into the hot oil.
7. Fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
8. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
9. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce.
